dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes early breakout entry before institutional arrival and exit into retail/short-covering wave. Entry uses pivot level as 'key chart point' proxy and volume confirmation. Exit conditions include volume multiplier (vol_ratio_20), close below prior low (gap down proxy), and 3% loss threshold. Intrabar execution requirement cannot be enforced at rule level (execution layer concern). Holding period capped at 4 calendar days via hold_days_max.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes early breakout entry before institutional arrival and exit into retail/short-covering wave. Entry uses pivot level as 'key chart point' proxy and volume confirmation. Exit conditions include volume multiplier (vol_ratio_20), close below prior low (gap down proxy), and 3% loss threshold. Intrabar execution requirement cannot be enforced at rule level (execution layer concern). Holding period capped at 4 calendar days via hold_days_max.

source_rule_text: Enter early-stage breakouts before the crowd arrives, and exit into the subsequent wave of late-arriving uninformed buying rather than hold for major moves.
